description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed, reinforced by vertical slats along the sides and ends. The cart is supported by four large, spoked wooden wheels, each attached at the corners for stability. Inside the cart, there are two large, beige burlap sacks, suggesting it is used for transporting goods or materials. The wood appears weathered and roughly finished, giving the cart a utilitarian, old-fashioned appearance. The open-top design allows for easy loading and unloading of items, while the high side rails help contain the cargo. There is no visible handle, indicating it may be pushed or pulled by gripping the frame itself.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with four large spoked wheels and two burlap sacks inside, featuring high side rails and an open cargo bed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, two large burlap sacks, and all four spoked wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open end of the cart, the two burlap sacks, and the width of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wooden slats, wheels, and the sacks inside.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back slats, both sacks, and the depth of the cart's interior.
